title: rudbeckia serotina f. gigantea
intro: Rudbeckia serotina f. gigantea is a tall, flowering plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its large, bright yellow petals with dark centers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Rudbeckia serotina f. gigantea is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and has been used in herbal remedies for its purported medicinal and health-promoting effects.
